text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: There she is! Quick, get the cameras!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's like a riot in here. Way different vibes from
other races I've been in.
choice_data_list: That's because it's the Hanshin J.F.
That's because it's the Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.text:
This is one of the few G1 races for junior-year
runners. Those who achieve good results here are
expected to do well in the years to come.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All eyes on today's field, huh. Then this is my
chance.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll show them a performance that will make them
see me differently.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
For myself... and for everyone hoping for my
success.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And, like, if you're supposed to be my trainer,
don't you have anything better to say?
choice_data_list:
Go out there and show them what you're made
of!

Go out there and show them what you're made
of!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You don't have to tell me that!
